macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: S&P 500 Closes at 6,370 After Fifth Consecutive Weekly Loss
items.summary: The S&P 500 closed Friday at approximately 6,370, marking a fifth straight weekly decline and placing it 9.0% below its January all-time high of 7,002, nearing an official correction. Technical indicators show deterioration with the VIX above 30 and RSI oversold, suggesting a potential short-term bounce amid ongoing market weakness.

items.title: Global Stock Markets Open Lower on March 30
items.summary: Asian markets opened sharply down, with Nikkei 225 falling 2.47%, Korea Composite down 4.73%, Hang Seng down 1.68%, Shanghai Composite down 0.75%, and S&P/ASX 200 down 1.15%; US and European markets had no trading.

items.title: US Markets Plunge on March 27 Amid Broader Weakness
items.summary: On March 27, S&P 500 dropped 1.67% (-108.31 points), Dow Jones fell 1.73% (-793.47 points), and Nasdaq declined 1.93% (-454.22 points), contributing to volatile sentiment with FII selling and negative Gift Nifty signaling further downside.

items.title: Indian Sector Indices Tumble with Realty, PSU Banks Leading Declines
items.summary: Nifty Realty fell 3.17% led by Lodha Developers (-4.6%) and Prestige Estates (-4.59%), Nifty PSU Bank dropped 3.86% with Bank of Baroda (-4.5%), while Oil & Gas and Metal indices also declined amid global weakness.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Breaks $66K as Crypto Market Recovers 1.2%
items.summary: Bitcoin surged above $66,000 while Ethereum reclaimed $2,000 in a relief rally driven by hopes of U.S.-Iran de-escalation in the Middle East conflict. The broader crypto market rebounded 1.2% to $2.4 trillion.

items.title: Ethereum Developers Propose 'Economic Zone' to Address Layer 2 Fragmentation
items.summary: Developers from Gnosis and Zisk, with Ethereum Foundation support, introduced the Ethereum Economic Zone framework to enable synchronous smart contract interactions across Layer 2 networks without traditional bridges. Total value locked across Layer 2s now approaches $40 billion.

items.title: WLD Token Plummets to Record Low of $0.24 Following Financing Deal
items.summary: Worldcoin's WLD token fell to an all-time low of $0.24 following news of a $25 million token deal, with half the tokens locked for six months and the remainder entering circulation immediately.

items.title: BlackRock Expands Crypto Ambitions with $350,000 Digital Assets Leadership Role
items.summary: BlackRock is scaling its cryptocurrency operations by creating a $350,000-per-year digital assets leadership position, signaling institutional confidence despite the Crypto Fear and Greed Index hitting 8 out of 100.

items.title: SUI Token Faces $37M Unlock on April 1 Amid Market Volatility
items.summary: Approximately 42.94 million SUI tokens are scheduled to unlock on April 1, representing $37-40 million in new supply. The unlock occurs during extreme market fear, potentially amplifying selling pressure.

items.title: Pepeto Ethereum Token Advances Toward Launch with $8.49M Presale
items.summary: The Ethereum-based token Pepeto entered final exchange testing with presale surpassing $8.49 million at record speed, drawing comparisons to early Dogecoin momentum.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Claims AGI Already Achieved, But Debate Over Definition Continues
items.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang told podcaster Lex Fridman that artificial general intelligence has been achieved, sparking debate over how to define and measure AGI. Google DeepMind researchers propose a framework requiring AI to match median human performance across 10 cognitive dimensions, with OpenAI's GPT-5 (released August 2025) scoring only 57%.

items.title: FPT Wins AI & Machine Learning Innovation Award for Insurance Platform
items.summary: Global IT services provider FPT received the AI & Machine Learning Innovation Award at the 2026 InsurInnovator Connect Asia Awards for iSuite, an AI-native digital insurance platform that reduces claims processing from days to minutes and improves fraud detection by 50%.

items.title: Pentagon's Use of AI Discussed by Humane Technology Expert
items.summary: NPR's Steve Inskeep speaks with Tristan Harris, co-founder of the Center for Humane Technology, about the Pentagon's deployment and use of artificial intelligence systems.

items.title: USPTO Adjusts AI Patent Eligibility Guidance Under New Leadership
items.summary: The U.S. Patent and Trademark Office under Director John Squires has revised its approach to AI patent eligibility, though federal courts continue applying established standards that reject generic machine learning applications.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Epic Games Lays Off Over 1000 Employees
items.summary: Epic Games has fired over 1000 employees amid declining Fortnite engagement and broader economic pressures in the video game industry. This is part of widespread layoffs affecting Epic, Sony, Ubisoft, and Meta’s Reality Labs.

items.title: Mass Layoffs Hit Video Game Industry Giants
items.summary: Epic Games, Sony, Ubisoft, and Meta’s Reality Labs are undergoing significant layoffs, highlighting financial challenges and a divide between corporate studios and indie developers. Industry veterans compare the downturn to the 1980s crash.

items.title: Sett Raises $30 Million Series B for AI Gaming Tech
items.summary: Tel Aviv-based startup Sett secured $30 million in Series B funding to scale its AI-driven user acquisition platform for the gaming industry.

items.title: Star Fox Leak Suggests Major Nintendo Year Ahead
items.summary: A leak indicates Star Fox will debut in The Super Mario Galaxy Movie, potentially signaling more Star Fox projects in 2026.

items.title: Tensions Rise in Australia's Gaming Industry
items.summary: New documents highlight economic potential and growth challenges in Australia's video game sector, emphasizing investment returns amid industry tensions.

items.title: Simulation RPG Market Projected to Hit $42.6 Billion by 2036
items.summary: The global Simulation Role-Playing Game market is expected to grow from $18 billion in 2026 to $42.6 billion by 2036 at a 9% CAGR, driven by mobile gaming and AI advances.

items.title: Video Game Stocks to Watch: Turtle Beach, Alliance Entertainment, Brag House
items.summary: MarketBeat highlights Turtle Beach (TBCH), Alliance Entertainment (AENT), and Brag House (TBH) as top video game stocks due to high recent trading volume.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Sigenergy Passes Hong Kong Stock Exchange Listing Hearing
items.summary: Sigenergy Technology, a provider of solar-storage-charging solutions, passed its listing hearing with the Hong Kong Stock Exchange on March 30, 2026. The company highlights its 'AI + stackable' technology for flexible energy system expansion.

items.title: Indian Air Force Launches 'Vayu Baan' Helicopter-Launched Drone System
items.summary: The Indian Air Force initiated Project 'Vayu Baan', India's first helicopter-launched Unmanned Aerial System for surveillance and precision strikes. It features EO/IR sensors and resilience against GPS jamming.

items.title: India's First Hydrogen Train Completes Oscillation Trials
items.summary: India's first hydrogen-powered trainset successfully completed oscillation trials in March 2026, as announced by Union Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw.

items.title: Tech Mahindra and IIT Bombay Sign MoU for 3D Digital Twin Smart Campus
items.summary: Tech Mahindra signed an MoU with IIT Bombay in March 2026 to develop a 3D Digital Twin of the Gymkhana Building for smart campus initiatives.

items.title: Fujitsu Develops High-Sensitivity Dual-Wavelength Infrared Sensor
items.summary: Fujitsu developed a high-sensitivity, high-resolution 2-wavelength infrared sensor to expand monitoring capabilities in defense and disaster prevention fields, announced March 27, 2026.
